name: Feeder
description: Library component. The continuation feeder -- dispatches slings to issues in non-deterministic order. Two-issue capacity (SLING1, SLING2 out-ports). Observes convoy state to know when to start dispatching. N-issue generalization requires more out-ports.

SLING1.description: sends Sling to the first issue. Tagged 'Sling'.

SLING2.description: sends Sling to the second issue. Tagged 'Sling'.

CONVOY_OBSERVE.description: observes convoy state. Dispatching starts when convoy = Open.

actors.name: Feeder
actors.owner: Parallel feeder. Non-deterministic dispatch order per the parallel-feeder fix from the gastown-guide monolith.
